title: Collision Box Component
description: Defines the area of the block that collides with entities. If set to true, default values are used. If set to false, the block's collision with entities is disabled.

oneOf.description: Defines multiple collision boxes for the block. Each collision box is defined as an object with 'origin' and 'size' properties.

origin.description: Minimal position of the bounds of the collision box. Specified as [x, y, z] and must be in the range (-8, 0, -8) to (8, 24, 8), inclusive.

size.description: Size of each side of the collision box. Specified as [x, y, z]. origin + size must be in the range (-8, 0, -8) to (8, 24, 8), inclusive.
